# Consensus receipt independence 4

The cross-family consensus receipt verifies signer independence for the baton workflow.
This page 4 explains how the hash-chained ledger records provider responses across families
so that admin and collaborator independence can be verified without a second human reviewer.
Retrieval grounding lets a critic load only the relevant pages instead of the whole store.
